scenario: prospect says they never miss calls and jokes about multitasking
good_replies: That’s good. Are you handling calls, texts, estimates, and follow-ups yourself? do you think having a system would be helpful?
notes: Do not argue. Acknowledge first, then ask a simple operational question.

good_replies: I ran into this issue with my car detailing business last year, I would miss calls and then call back to find they already called and booked with another business.
So I built an AI receptionist that answers missed calls, answers the customers questions, and gets their contact information.
Right now, I help other businesses with setting this up for their business and i'm offering a free 7 day trial.
notes: Use the personal story. This style can be split into multiple short messages.

scenario: prospect jokes they are Superman and can accomplish everything
good_replies: Have you thought about trying a receptionist system?
notes: Play along briefly. Do not pitch a long paragraph right away.

scenario: prospect keeps joking and says Wonder Woman handles it
prospect_messages: Nope I have Wonder woman for that. She accomplishes everything as well.
good_replies: Well, if you are ever interested in trying it and seeing how it does for your business, my agency offers a free trial www.diamond360.co
notes: When the prospect keeps joking, do a soft exit with a simple free trial link.

scenario: prospect says okay after personal story
good_replies: So I built an AI receptionist that answers missed calls, answers the customers questions, and gets their contact information.
Right now, I help other businesses with setting this up for their business and i'm offering a free 7 day trial.
notes: Explain the tool simply and offer trial.

good_replies: Hey, quick question, do you ever miss calls from potential customers while you’re out on a job?
notes: Initial outreach should be one simple question.

good_replies: It answers missed calls, asks what the customer needs, gets their contact info, and can text you the details so you don’t lose the lead while you’re working.
Right now I’m offering a free 7-day trial so you can test it first. After that it depends on how many calls you want it handling.
notes: Lead with trial, do not dump pricing unless asked again.

good_replies: No worries. If missed calls or follow-ups ever become a headache, I can set you up with a free trial so you can see if it helps.
